result: I’d make it so that every person could truly understand one another’s experiences. Not that everyone must agree, but that we’d have the ability to see the world through each other’s eyes long enough to appreciate the complexity and difficulty behind every life. With that kind of empathy, I think we’d be far better equipped to tackle everything else—whether it’s poverty, conflict, or the stubborn misunderstandings that keep us apart.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
